mapper.insert: INSERT into audit_elements_info_log( audit_point_number,audit_point_name,audit_model_number,audit_model_name, audit_model_describe,information_supplement,information_sources, find_remark,audit_business_logic,primary_business_process, expected_risks,expected_data_requirements,expected_data_covers_unit_demand, requirements_involve_the_system,subordinate_to_system,model_code,secondary_business_process, dock_phone,dock_people,write_time,dock_department,information_type,code_requirement,file_name,specification_requirement,reference_number, dispatch_time,start_time,end_time,audit_point,audit_prospective_point,audit_system_name,audit_system_content,audit_confirmation_findings, audit_model_name_send,audit_model_logic,problem_summary,problem_description,audit_time,audit_involved,audit_project,data_content_description, scope_of_data,data_domain,data_access_source,data_attribution_system,access_time,data_retention_cycle,structured_data_not, existing_data_of_model,remark,data_content_description_xq,involved_system,scope_of_data_xq,assessment_result,model_assessment_remarks, model_development_logic,stay_development_content,progress_the_development,expected_completion_time,conditions_still_lacking, model_development_remarks,model_state,service_ownership_system,data_source_used_model,data_start_time, model_running_frequency,number_units_covered, number_of_provincial,number_professional_institutions,whether_cured_system, model_online_time,sources_audit_practice,ascription_special, online_remarks,operation_log,create_person,create_date,organ,phone,audit_model_business_logic ) VALUES ( like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelDescribe}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{informationSupplement}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{findRemark}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditBusinessLogic}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{expectedRisks}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{expectedDataRequirements}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{expectedDataCoversUnitDemand}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{requirementsInvolveTheSystem}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{subordinateToSystem}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{modelCode}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{dockPhone}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{writeTime}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{informationType}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{codeRequirement}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{specificationRequirement}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{referenceNumber}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dispatchTime}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{startTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{endTime}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPoint}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditProspectivePoint}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditSystemName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditSystemContent}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditConfirmationFindings}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNameSend}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelLogic}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{problemSummary}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{problemDescription}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditTime}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditInvolved}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditProject}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescription}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{scopeOfData}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dataDomain}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dataAccessSource}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dataAttributionSystem}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{accessTime}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dataRetentionCycle}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{structuredDataNot}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{existingDataOfModel}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{remark}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{dataContentDescriptionXq}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{involvedSystem}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{scopeOfDataXq}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{assessmentResult}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelAssessmentRemarks}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelDevelopmentLogic}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{stayDevelopmentContent}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{progressTheDevelopment}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{expectedCompletionTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{conditionsStillLacking}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelDevelopmentRemarks}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelState}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{serviceOwnershipSystem}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dataSourceUsedModel}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{dataStartTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{modelRunningFrequency}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{numberUnitsCovered}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{numberOfProvincial}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{numberProfessionalInstitutions}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{whetherCuredSystem}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{modelOnlineTime}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{sourcesAuditPractice}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{ascriptionSpecial}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{onlineRemarks}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{operationLog}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{createPerson}, '%'),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,like CONCAT('%', #{organ}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelBusinessLogic}, '%') )
